title: Library Statistics
content: Library Statistics LRC consistently keeps track of library usage, which aids in monitoring the library’s utilization. This practice not only assists in delivering quality services to library users but also plays a pivotal role in planning and implementing various measures and provisions to create a conducive study environment. Some of the statistics are being highlighted as: Circulation Related Statistics Books Issued Books Returned E-Resources Usage Statistics Logins to OPAC E-Resource downloads Acquisition Related Statistics Books added in the library collection Book Collections (Department-wise) Book Collection (Broad Groups) Periodicals Related Statistics Periodicals in the Library General Statistics LRC usage (Overall) LRC visits (Footfall) Five days of high usage in 2021-22 Five days of high usage in 2022-23 Five days of high usage in 2023-24 Yearly Five days of high usage
